title: runtime/v1 AgentCard extension params
description: Schema for the params object on an AgentCard capabilities.extensions[] entry whose uri is https://agentic-sandbox.aiwg.io/extensions/runtime/v1. Declares the VM/container runtime backing an agentic-sandbox instance.

loadout.description: Name of the agentic-sandbox loadout (profile + agent toolchain) provisioned for this instance. Maps 1:1 to a loadout.yaml known to the management server.

image_ref.description: Reference to the underlying image. For runtime=vm this is a qcow2:// URL with an @sha256: digest fragment. For runtime=container this is an OCI image reference (registry/name@sha256:<hex> or registry/name:tag).

instance_id.description: UUID v4 identifying the runtime instance. Stable for the instance's lifetime. MUST NOT be derived from secret material.
